IntroToColony_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "2A2AEED1467E92EEDA7F2E85E9990FE5", "Welcome to the site of your claim on <Important>Meridian</>!

It is here that you will construct your <Important>Outpost</>, supporting your mining operations below the surface.

<Important>Objectives</> are shown in the top-left of the screen - you can hover over this panel to view them or scroll the list if needed.

<Important>Maeve</> will automatically record events and discoveries in the <Important>Journal</> <Cyan>(J)</> as you play.

Refer to your <Important>Objectives</> and <Important>Journal</> if you ever get stuck and aren't sure how to proceed.")
